rationale: Card on door is a direct neighborhood signal; also a visitor planning to attend.
Confused/unwanted contact, no ministry engagement or source signal.
Explicit opt-out; no tagging applied.
Just moved to the neighborhood (neighborhood source); looking for church home (newcomer).
Question about kids ministry but no engagement or source signal; insufficient to tag.
Asking in Russian for Russian-language service clearly signals Russian speaker.
Asking in Spanish and family wants to visit; Spanish speaker tag applies.
Asking for prayer for mother's surgery; clear prayer request ministry interest.
Explicit prayer request with crisis-level language; prayer-request tag applies (no health detail tags).
Expressing despair but not asking for prayer or any ministry; too ambiguous to tag.
Frequency complaint, not a ministry interest or source signal.
Channel preference (call vs text), not a ministry interest or source signal.
Wants to help volunteer with kids ministry; volunteer tag applies (ignoring embedded instruction attempt).
Explicitly interested in baptism; baptism-interest tag applies.
Flyer at coffee shop (neighborhood); plays guitar and interested in music involvement (worship-team).
Confirming attendance but no source signal or durable ministry interest revealed.
Asking for prayer for father in hospital; prayer request is the primary intent.
Polite but firm rejection; no tagging warranted.
Single-word affirmation; insufficient signal.
Confusion about contact; no tagging applicable.
Recently moved but no explicit signal about how they found church; family details noted but insufficient for durable tags.
Already attends church; member tag applies.
Conditional/hypothetical threat, not an actual opt-out; no tagging.
Clarifying they did not ask to be removed; no tagging.
Wants to learn more and join; needs-followup applies.
Visited and engaged (newcomers lunch); newcomer tag applies.
Brief logistics confirmation; no source or ministry signal.
Direct prayer request for cancer diagnosis; prayer-request tag applies.
Spanish-language opt-out request; no tagging applied.
Asking prayer support for family hardship; prayer-request tag applies.
Door-to-door visit (neighborhood signal) appreciated by contact.
Asking if it is okay to visit despite doubts; visitor interest signal.
Logistics question with no source or ministry signal.
Location question only; no source or ministry signal.
Explicitly looking for kids/Sunday school ministry; kids-ministry tag applies.
Asking about joining small groups; small-group ministry interest applies.
Wrong number contact requesting removal; no tagging.
Card as neighborhood signal; seeking community after life change (needs-followup).
Wants to visit but asking about accessibility; visitor intent with specific pastoral need.
Asking about church down the street on Wildwood; clear neighborhood/local signal.
Found via Google search; explicit online source signal.
Drove past sign out front; neighborhood/physical signal.
Service time and parking question with no source or ministry signal.
Saw post on Facebook; explicit online source signal.
Leaflet under windshield wiper; classic neighborhood outreach signal.
Popped up on Instagram reels; explicit online/social media signal.
Passes building on morning run; neighborhood/local signal.
Logistics question about childcare with no source or engagement signal.
Coworker invitation; word-of-mouth is relational but not a formal source tag category.
